equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: structured phase helpers exist, but payload lifecycle logging with attempt metadata is absent from the audited execution path.

checked_queries: block_phase path outcome duration count attempt_id attempt_kind payload
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Payload lifecycle logs with attempt metadata are not wired into the payload builder; the port only has helper definitions and block-accept phase logging.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-metrics/src/block.rs defines structured block_phase/path/outcome/duration/count helpers and payload helpers with attempt_id/attempt_kind.
crates/engine/tree/src/tree/payload_validator.rs uses structured block_accept phase logs with path/outcome/duration/count.
Search found no payload builder calls to log_payload_building_start, log_payload_building_end, or log_payload_phase_with_attempt, so payload attempt metadata is not emitted.

notes: Block-accept lifecycle fields are present, but the invariant also requires payload attempt metadata where available.
rationale: The diff adds shared block-phase logging helpers, annotates verification and payload build logs with paths/outcomes, and emits detailed async collection and augmentation phase records with attempt metadata. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Block and payload lifecycle logs must include structured `block_phase`, `path`, `outcome`, timing, count, and attempt metadata where available, so build and verification phases can be correlated across logs.
suggested_falsification_tests: Capture tracing output from a payload build and block verification run. Assert phase logs contain `block_phase=true`, correct `path` values for payload/acceptance phases, outcome strings, duration/count fields, and payload attempt metadata on payload phases.
summary: Payload lifecycle structured phase fields are not wired.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Capture payload build tracing and assert payload phases include block_phase, path, outcome, timing/count, payload_id, attempt_id, and attempt_kind; current payload calls are absent.
title: Block lifecycle logs carry structured phase fields
